content:
@claude 추가로 views 변경 스니펫도 공유합니다.

`ocaml/lib/views.ml`
- `season_dropdown` 시그니처를 `?(current_season=Some Domain.default_season)`로 바꾸고:
```ocaml
let season_dropdown ?(current_season=Some default_season) ?(target="#players-table") ?(include_selector="") () =
  let all_selected = match current_season with None -> " selected" | Some _ -> "" in
  let options =
    Domain.all_seasons
    |> List.map (fun s ->
      let selected = if current_season = Some s then " selected" else "" in
      Printf.sprintf {|<option value="%s"%s>%s</option>|}
        (Domain.season_to_code s) selected (Domain.season_to_name s))
    |> String.concat "\n"
  in
  ...
  Printf.sprintf {|...<option value="ALL"%s>All Seasons</option>%s...</select>|}
    all_selected options
```
- `home_page`도 `?(current_season=Some default_season)`로 바꾸고 라벨은 `Domain.season_filter_label current_season`.

(HTML value는 여전히 string이지만, 생성은 `season_to_code`에서만 하게 해서 stringly-typed 확산을 막는 방향)
